title: Stronger Agents with LangChain and LangGraph
tagline: Use a typed LangGraph to route requests, cap work, and reduce time to first useful response.

story.problem: The first three cookbooks work, but a path that spends 40 seconds, 1421 input tokens, and 535 output tokens on a single answer still feels too slow for production.
story.solution: Rebuild the agent loop as a LangGraph state graph: a deterministic route node chooses a direct or deliberate path, LangChain prompt templates prepare messages, and graph events stream back to the route before the model finishes.
story.outcome: A faster orchestration skeleton that can skip unnecessary work today and later grow into durable execution, persistent context, interrupts, evaluators, and guardrails without turning the FastAPI route into orchestration glue.

endpoints.description: Run the agent against a user prompt and stream SSE events back.
